name: Senary Numbers
description: Converts numerical displays in GD to senary, with pernifage progress.

debug-logging.name: Debug logging
debug-logging.description: Log every string conversion to the Geode console, for finding over/under-conversion.

editor-senary-input.name: Editor senary input
editor-senary-input.description: Interpret typed numbers in trigger popups as senary (display keeps typed digits). Turn off if ID fields misbehave.

fast-suppressed-respawn.name: Fast suppressed respawn
fast-suppressed-respawn.description: Skip the New Best fanfare delay when an intra-pernif best is suppressed. Experimental: forces the normal-death respawn timing.

six-per-page.name: Six levels per page
six-per-page.description: Slice browser pages to six levels each (client-side).
